Off Calendar Jun-21-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cynthia Jackson, Esq. 650-798-0300 x0333 of Dentons US LLP for Defendant through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem, reports Defendant is not opposing and will not be appearing. Plaintiff requests to augment sanctions and terminate sanctions. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT STUDIO SF ACCESSORIES, INC.'s Motion For Terminating Or, In The Alternative, Issue And Evidence Sanctions; To Deem Certain Facts Admitted; And For Monetary Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Sections 2023.010, 2023.020, 2023.030, 2033.280 And Cal. Rule Of Court 2.30 (B) And (D).

Taken Under Submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Stephanie Krmpotic, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
